# Vonerio

> Fractional sales leadership for B2B software and tech-services teams: diagnose, build and run the sales system so revenue does not depend on one or two people.

## Who it is for

B2B software and tech-services companies, roughly $2M to $30M in revenue, with a sales team of 3 to 15+ reps. Companies that have outgrown founder-led selling but cannot yet justify a $200K full-time VP of Sales, with a real, human sales motion to improve (not pure self-serve).

## Positioning

- AI readiness. AI amplifies whatever is already there, including the mess. On dirty data and loose process, AI tools scale the chaos faster. Vonerio builds the clean foundation (playbook, qualification standard, CRM as single source of truth) the tools need to work.
- Key-person risk. Capture what your best people do so revenue survives any exit. The system, not one or two heroes, owns the number.

## Offerings

- Diagnostic. A data-driven read on what is slowing the pipeline, scored against four readiness pillars, with a prioritized action plan. Prices on /services.
- System Building. Co-built with your reps: playbook, MEDDPICC-based qualification standard, battle cards, cadences, CRM configuration spec and a KPI dashboard design. Final payment tied to a real adoption signal. Prices on /services.
- Fractional CRO. Revenue ownership on shared time: the number, the plan, the operating cadence and forecast. Still gets on the calls and closes the top deals alongside your reps. Prices on /services.

Current prices, tiers and timelines are shown in full on the Services page (https://vonerio.com/services). That page is the single source of pricing truth.

## Proof

- $26M+ personally closed while carrying a quota.
- 214% average quota attainment (peak 323%).
- Largest deal $16.2M, across 12 countries.
- Ex-Accenture, MEDDPICC-trained, 10+ years enterprise sales.

## Geography

Remote across APAC and EMEA. APAC (Singapore, Indonesia, Southeast Asia) is primary for ongoing Fractional CRO work, where timezone proximity matters. EMEA is well suited to project-based Diagnostic and System Building.

## Key pages

- [Services](https://vonerio.com/services): offerings, tiers and prices
- [About](https://vonerio.com/about): founder and track record
- [FAQ](https://vonerio.com/faq): full FAQ
- [Contact](https://vonerio.com/contact): book a call or send a message
- [Scorecard](https://vonerio.com/scorecard): free 3-minute readiness score
